rule CDB_PX4_Autopilot {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for PX4 Autopilot"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-APT-22" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
